Home health aide visits at an appropriate frequency 
would be reasonable and necessary to assist in these tasks. 

EXAMPLE 2: 

A physician ordered four home health aide visits per week for personal care for a 
multiple sclerosis patient who is unable to perform these functions because of increasing 
debilitation. The home health aide gave the patient a bath twice per week and washed 
hair on the other two visits each week. Only two visits are reasonable and necessary 
since the services could
